channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Apple plays catch-up at WWDC - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Apple plays catch-up at WWDC  TechCrunch

  4. Introducing the Third Generation of Apple’s Foundation Models  Apple Machine Learning Research
  5. Apple pitches a more personal, easier-to-use AI  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 - Apple
item.description:
1. Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27  Apple
  2. Apple Delays Siri AI for iPhone Users in the EU, Says Regulators Refusing to Engage  Bloomberg.com
  3. The new Siri won’t be available on iPhones in the EU, due to Digital Markets Act  9to5Mac
  4. Siri AI For iPhones And iPads Will Be Delayed Indefinitely In The EU  Engadget
  5. Apple is 'deeply disappointed' with E.U. setback  MarketWatch

item.title: iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 don’t drop support for any iPhones—and just a few iPads - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 don’t drop support for any iPhones—and just a few iPads  Ars Technica
